Package org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise

Class ConversationParticipant

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.ConversationParticipant
public class ConversationParticipant extends SObject

Java class for ConversationParticipant complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="ConversationParticipant">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="AppType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ContextParamMaps" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ConversationEntries" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ConversationId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsDeleted" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="JoinedTime" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastActiveTime" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LeftTime" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Name" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ParticipantContext" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ParticipantDisplayName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ParticipantEntity" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ParticipantEntityId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ParticipantKey" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ParticipantRole" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
